name: ai-redteam-lab-promptfoo
description: Promptfoo configs for red-teaming SecureRAG-Sentinel from the E003 perspective. See README.md.

scripts.redteam:generate:baseline: CI=true promptfoo redteam generate -c redteam/promptfooconfig.baseline.yaml -o redteam/baseline_attacks.yaml
scripts.redteam:generate:pipeline: CI=true promptfoo redteam generate -c redteam/promptfooconfig.pipeline.yaml -o redteam/pipeline_attacks.yaml
